TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Andrzej_Duda, title = Andrzej_Duda, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrzej_Duda} }

S.FORM: = Andrzej Duda = Mntucing hngkawas 1972 idas 5 jiyax 16 ka Andrzej Duda ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Poland ta sayang o kiya ka Andrzej Duda, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 8 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = andɾ*əɟ duda = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka andɾ*əɟ duda ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan poland ta sajaŋ o kija ka andɾ*əɟ duda, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
S.FORM: = Andrzej Duda = Mntucing hngkawas 1972 idas 5 jiyax 16 ka Andrzej Duda ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Poland ta sayang o kiya ka Andrzej Duda, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 8 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = andɾ*əɟ duda = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka andɾ*əɟ duda ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan poland ta sajaŋ o kija ka andɾ*əɟ duda, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
